headline: Apple Preparing Monthly iPad, Mac Payment Plans for Apple Card
Barron's Picks And Pans: SYSCO, Twitter, Zoom Video And More
summary:
This weekend's Barron's cover story wonders whether a beleaguered social media giant may be headed higher.
	Other featured articles look at where CEOs and corporations stand as racial tensions flare up.

headline: Benzinga's Bulls And Bears Of The Week: Gilead, Shopify, Tesla And More
summary:
Benzinga has examined the prospects for many investor favorite stocks over the past week. 
	This week's bullish calls included semiconductor and casino stocks.
	Cruise and electric vehicle stocks were among the bearish calls.
